integration_classic_scenarios.name: vague_warm_user_with_profile
integration_classic_scenarios.description: Warm user with vague query - should use ALS and mention reading history
integration_classic_scenarios.query: recommend something good for me to read

integration_classic_scenarios.name: vague_cold_user_with_profile
integration_classic_scenarios.description: Cold user with profile, vague query - should use favorite subjects
integration_classic_scenarios.query: what's a good book to start with

integration_classic_scenarios.name: vague_new_user_no_profile
integration_classic_scenarios.description: New user, no profile, vague query - should use popular books

integration_classic_scenarios.name: specific_single_subject_fantasy
integration_classic_scenarios.description: Genre query with 1-3 subjects - should use subject_id_search

integration_classic_scenarios.name: specific_descriptive_short
integration_classic_scenarios.description: Short descriptive query with themes/tone - should use semantic search
integration_classic_scenarios.query: dark atmospheric mystery novels with psychological tension

integration_classic_scenarios.name: specific_descriptive_long
integration_classic_scenarios.description: Long multi-faceted descriptive query - should use semantic search
integration_classic_scenarios.query: I'm searching for a book that combines elements of magical realism with historical fiction set in a Latin American context featuring strong female protagonists who navigate complex family dynamics while dealing with supernatural elements that are woven seamlessly into everyday life with beautiful prose that is both lyrical and accessible
